name: CAPTAIN AMERICA
description: Enhanced by the Super-Soldier Serum, Steven "Steve" Rogers uses his Vibranium shield and extensive combat training to confront any threat to justice. When Captain America rallies his troops, a wave of courage sweeps across the battlefield!
lore: In hopes of serving his country during World War II, young Steve Rogers volunteered for an experiment that enhanced his strength, speed, and agility, making him America's first super soldier. As Captain America, he proudly fought enemy forces until he became frozen in ice and lost to the ages. Discovered and unthawed in the 2099, Captain America began battling the threats of tomorrow — including Doom 2099. Now, he fights alongside the Avengers to prevent the desperate future he awoke in.

abilities.name: Sentinel Strike
abilities.description: Get up close to strike enemies. Landing the second hit enables a shield throw that can ricochet four times

stats.Damage: Melee Attack Damage: 45, Flying Shield Damage: 45
stats.Attack Interval: Melee 1st Hit: 0.4s, Melee 2nd Hit: 0.5s, Flying Shield 1st Hit: 0.5s, Flying Shield 2nd Hit: 0.57s
stats.Special Effect: Automatically target enemies near the crosshair

abilities.name: Freedom Charge
abilities.description: Shield held high, carve a path forward, granting both himself and allies along the path continuous Bonus Health and Movement Boosts. Allies also gain Ultimate Ability Charge Acceleration. Using Living Legend and Leading Dash while this ability is active can Launch Up enemies

stats.Range: A spherical spell field with a 4m radius enveloping the caster, and a spell area with a width of 4m along the path
stats.Health Recovery Rate: Cast to gain 150 Bonus Health and grant allies 100 Bonus Health. Every second afterward, gain 100 Bonus Health and grant allies 60 Bonus Health
stats.Movement Boost: Grant a 30% Movement Boost to both yourself and your allies
stats.Special Effect: Allies within its path gain a 20% boost to Ultimate Energy charge efficiency

abilities.name: Leading Dash
abilities.description: Boost speed and enable Fearless Leap to leap into the air

abilities.name: Vibranium Energy Saw
abilities.description: Hurl the energy-charged shield to strike enemies in a path

stats.Damage: Start at 70, with a 20% reduction for each ricochet

abilities.name: Liberty Rush
abilities.description: Raise the shield and charge forward

abilities.name: Super-Soldier Slam
abilities.description: Slam down from the sky onto the targeted area, Launching Up enemies

abilities.name: Living Legend
abilities.description: Raise the shield to deflect incoming projectiles, sending them ricocheting in random directions

received.name: Captain's Spirit
received.description: Inspired by Captain America's resolve, Winter Soldier can leap to the aid of a designated ally, slamming the ground with his mechanical arm to deal damage to nearby foes. Additionally, Captain America and Winter Soldier can interact with each other once both parties confirm. The duo collides and unleashes a shockwave that deals damage and inflicts slow on enemies

received.name: VIBRANIUM BASTION
received.description: Black Cat shares her luck with her allies. When White Fox embraces her newfound fortune, she unleashestracking Spirit Tails to grant Healing and Speed to allies, while damaging and Slowing foes. When Captain America enjoys his luck, his shield's block radius expands and allows him to aim deflectedProjectiles directly toward his target

stats.Special Effect: Within the duration, deflect Projectiles ricochet directly toward his target direction.

base.description: Captain America can leap directly to a teammate, providing Bonus Health to both himself and the ally, while redirecting a portion of their incoming damage to himself.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Winter Soldier, the duo can trigger a mutual rally. Upon confirmation, they charge at one another, slamming together to grant Bonus Health and Movement Speed to all nearby friends. The original effect remains, now additionally granting a Speed Boost to the targeted teammate.

base.description: Modifies Sentinel Strike into a Lightning Shield projectile. After landing two hits, Captain America launches the piercing Lightning Shield four times.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Thor, the lightning energy imbued in the shield intensifies. Each hit from the Lightning Shield triggers an extra burst of damage in the surrounding area.
